messages.text: Why am I getting AccessDenied from S3?

messages.header: curl -s localhost:5110/api/events | jq '[.[] | select(.summary | contains("s3") or contains("S3"))]'

messages.text: Found the S3 request in Smello. The URL is `s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod-data-backup/...` but your config sets `bucket = "prod-data"`. The SDK is hitting the wrong bucket. The env var `S3_BUCKET` is set to `prod-data-backup` and overrides the config file.
